title: Immigration Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Having the right paperwork is crucial for working and staying in Vietnam. Our immigration services can simplify your entry, permits, and residency.

hero.title: Immigration Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Vietnam's strict regulations for foreigners can be navigated with WTP Advisory's immigration services, aiding businesses and individuals. Obtain immigration services quickly and effectively with a trusted partner who puts your needs first.

sections.heading: For Business Purposes
body: If you're a businessperson coming to Vietnam to meet partners, sign contracts, or do administrative work, you'll need the right entry paperwork specific to your purposes.

sections.heading: For Investment Purposes
body: Vietnam offers longer entry and residence for international investors who seek to start their own business in Vietnam or invest in Vietnamese firms or industries.

sections.subtitle: This service from WTP Advisory will help you:
items: Stay in Vietnam for an extended duration as per the validity period depending on your investment
Prolong your stay with the necessary procedures
Submit an application for a temporary residence card with a validity period of up to 10 years with DT1, DT2 and DT3

sections.title: WTP Advisory offers contractor payroll services that give your company a strategic advantage.

sections.heading: Work Permit
body: A Work Permit enables foreign workers in Vietnam to be employed and conduct business activities that result in profits. Foreign investors who have companies in Vietnam can be exempted from work permit applications.

sections.subtitle: This service from WTP Advisory will help you:
items: Stay protected and ensure your rights under employment contracts
Become eligible for a Temporary Residence Card, allowing for much longer residence in Vietnam

sections.heading: Temporary Residence Card
body: A temporary residence card (TRC) is a document issued to a foreigner who is permitted to reside in Vietnam for a certain period of time. It has the same value as a visa and allows multiple entries during its validity.

sections.subtitle: This service from WTP Advisory will help you:
items: Reside in Vietnam for two to five years, saving time, money, and resources
Smoothly acquire real estate and get a driving license in Vietnam

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions on Immigration Services

items.q: Do I need a legal entity in Vietnam to hire employees?
items.a: You can recruit both local and foreign employees in Vietnam for your company without establishing a legal entity. Common ways to do this include using recruitment technology platforms, employer of record (EOR) providers, or direct hiring through various communication channels.

items.q: Can I pay my employees from abroad as a foreign employer?
items.a: You can set up your payroll and payroll compliance entirely remotely. As legal obligations, you have to submit all paperwork for employee registration and salary payment to relevant authorities, namely the Department or Ministry of Labour, Invalids and Social Affairs.

items.q: What are all the services included in the HR outsourcing package?
items.a: When applying for our comprehensive HR outsourcing services, you have the option of choosing one of, some of, or all of the available services, including payroll, recruitment, work permits, and immigration support.
